title: Ukrainian Paska
description: A traditional Ukrainian double-rise bread featuring cilantro leaves, perfect for snacking or serving as a side dish.
instructions: Combine warm water and yeast in a large bowl, let sit for 5 minutes until yeast is activated.
Add flour, salt, and unsalted butter to the bowl, mix until dough comes together.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until doubled in size.

Punch down the dough, shape into a round loaf, and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.','Place chopped cilantro leaves on top of the loaf.','Bake the Paska for 25 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Let the Paska cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
